rationale: Obligation requires post1_self_ == post2_self_ where StrictlyOrderedVec<K> wraps Vec<K> with closed view. Empirically verified that Verus cannot derive Vec equality from view equality (v1@ == v2@ does NOT imply v1 == v2 or v1 =~= v2 or v1 =~~= v2 for Vec<T>, even with broadcast use group_vec_axioms). The erase() spec only constrains the view (self@ == ...), not the underlying Vec, so structural determinism is logically unprovable without strengthening the spec or adding a Vec-extensional-equality axiom. Best-effort proof block asserts post1_self_@ =~= post2_self_@ which establishes view equality but does not close the structural-equality gap.
